h1.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically bold, centered, and significantly larger serif font in this document style.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically bold, left-aligned serif font.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: In-text parenthetical citation (Author-Date format), sometimes hyperlinked in blue.
Footnote text located at the bottom of the page, set in a smaller font size than the body text.
Page footer containing the page number followed by the author's name in all caps.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom footer line (e.g., '234 ARTHUR J. CAPLAN') and footnote blocks at the bottom of the page.
